sections.placeholder: Concise, prioritised bullets. State the ACR BI-RADS 5th ed final assessment category on its own line (0 incomplete — additional imaging/priors; 1 negative; 2 benign; 3 probably benign ≤2%, 6-month follow-up; 4A/4B/4C suspicious — biopsy; 5 highly suggestive ≥95% — biopsy; 6 known malignancy), consistent with composition and the most suspicious lesion, with management drawn from approved follow-up.
